name: Chinese Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: 8 1/4 ounces Pineapple, crushed and drained (packed in its own juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded Chinese cabbage, crushed pineapple, and sliced water chestnuts in a large bowl.
2. Add the parsley and green onion to the bowl and mix well.
3. In a separate small bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, mustard, and grated gingerroot until combined.
4. Pour the dressing over the cabbage mixture and toss gently to coat evenly.
5. Cover the bowl and chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
~Per Serving: 57 calories, 1 gram protein, 9 grams carbohydrates, 2 grams fat, 0 milligrams cholesterol, 80 milligrams sodium.
